channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Marvel Cosmic Invasion Adds Cyclops And The Thing Today, New Game Mode Coming
item.content:encoded:
Marvel Cosmic Invasion was a return to classic arcade beat-em-up form, following on the heels of other properties like the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles. Today publisher Dotemu and Tribute Games have announced and released the first character DLC for Cosmic Invasion. On top of releasing two new playable characters there have also been teases into what DLC 2 for Marvel Cosmic Invasion will entail, and when it will release.

Today, players will be able to purchase DLC 1 for $3.99 or whatever their local equivalent is to get immediate access to The Thing and Cyclops. Revealing more information about these characters The Thing is described as a 'grappling-focused powerhouse. With surprising mobility allowing him to bounce across environments to get the jump on enemies." For Cyclops, the leader of the X-Men, "Cyclops blasts into battle to make quick work of foes with his signature kinetic energy beams. Cyclops’ optic blasts can also be shot diagonally, providing an excellent counter for aerial enemies"

DLC 2 is planned to be launched in Fall 2026, so not too long to wait. While specific details weren't mentioned about what it would be, there was a tease that a new game mode will be getting added to the day. For the players who have already finished the game, as well as all of the side content, this will be a great chance to dive back into the game. There was also a tease that "Super Heroes (and Villains!) will be revealed later this year alongside even more playable characters."

Andrew has written Video Game and Entertainment news, reviews, and guides for 10+ years. As Senior Content Manager, he assists in creating and editing… More about Andrew
